districts.name: Industrial Core
districts.description: The beating heart of manufacturing, where massive forge-complexes and processing plants churn out goods for the hive. Toxic byproducts and industrial accidents are a constant hazard.
districts.playstyleFavored: Mixed - elite-friendly factory fights with anti-elite environmental options

districts.name: Hab Blocks
districts.description: Towering residential stacks where millions live in cramped squalor. The lower levels have been overtaken by mutant fungal growth, creating a nightmare maze of corridors and spore-choked chambers.
districts.playstyleFavored: Horde & melee - dense population with organic growth in lower levels

districts.name: Trade Hub
districts.description: A vital nexus of commerce where cargo flows between districts. Bustling markets give way to worker housing and abandoned warehouse districts gutted by gang warfare.
districts.playstyleFavored: Mobile & objective-focused - shipping yards to burned-out warehouses

districts.name: Cinder Row
districts.description: A district gutted by the Great Conflagration three decades past. Charred hab-shells stand like blackened teeth while ash dunes shift around mountains of melted slag. Rival gangs clash over rumored caches buried beneath the ruins.
districts.playstyleFavored: Contested - elite-friendly open ground vs horde-friendly scrap piles

districts.name: The Dregs
districts.description: The lowest inhabited level of the hive, where everything unwanted eventually sinks. Toxic sumps bubble beneath crumbling archways while mutant fungi consume the dead. Only the truly desperate call this place home.
districts.playstyleFavored: Chaotic & melee - the deepest, most dangerous levels

districts.name: Manufactorium District
districts.description: A sprawling industrial zone where raw materials arrive at the docks, are processed in vast factories, and waste is dumped in ever-growing slag mountains.
districts.playstyleFavored: Mixed - factories, shipping, and waste disposal

districts.name: The Blight
districts.description: Once a thriving worker's district, now a festering wound on the hive. Chemical fires left the surface scorched while fungal mutations spread through the ruins beneath. Gangs fight for control of the few salvageable structures.
districts.playstyleFavored: Attrition - contaminated zones favor staying power

districts.name: Freight Spine
districts.description: The main cargo artery of the hive, where endless convoys of haulers move goods between districts. Leaking chem-tankers and turf wars over smuggling routes make this a dangerous but lucrative territory.
districts.playstyleFavored: Mobile - cargo routes through hazardous areas

districts.name: Scrap Town
districts.description: A ramshackle settlement built atop generations of discarded refuse. Desperate hivers carve homes from wrecked machinery while scavenger gangs war over salvage rights to the ancient ruins buried beneath the junk.
districts.playstyleFavored: Varied - where civilization meets the abyss
